homepage.heroSubline: We restore vehicles to showroom condition in Savannah's harsh coastal climate. Every swirl mark removed, every surface protected against salt air corrosion.
aboutText: Founded in 2012, Apex Auto Detailing grew from a passion for automotive preservation in Savannah's punishing environment. Our team studied corrosion patterns specific to Lowcountry vehicles before developing protective protocols.

We approach each vehicle like conservators restoring fine art. The same humidity that preserves Savannah's historic architecture accelerates automotive decay - we counteract it with scientific precision.
As active members of Savannah's automotive community, we sponsor local car shows and offer discounts to military families stationed at Hunter Army Airfield.

services.name: Ceramic Coating
services.shortDescription: Multi-year protection against Savannah's corrosive coastal environment.
services.description:
Our ceramic coating service isn't just a shiny top layer - it's a molecular bond that creates an impermeable barrier against Savannah's unique threats. The salt-laden breezes from the Atlantic accelerate oxidation, while summer humidity breeds mold in ventilation systems.

We begin with a full decontamination wash using water softened to prevent mineral deposits. After mechanical and chemical paint correction, our proprietary 9H ceramic formula is hand-applied in climate-controlled conditions - crucial for proper curing in our humid environment. The result repels everything from tree sap in Forsyth Park to industrial fallout near the port.
process: Step 1: Iron decontamination to remove rail dust from Savannah's active train lines
Step 2: Multi-stage paint correction addressing swirls from palmetto fronds and sandy roads
Step 3: Precision application of marine-grade ceramic formula
Step 4: 48-hour curing in our humidity-controlled facility
benefits: UV protection prevents Savannah sun damage

faq.question: How does your coating differ from others in Savannah?
faq.answer: We use a hybrid formula developed specifically for coastal climates, with added polymers to combat salt intrusion. Most national brands don't account for our unique environmental factors.

faq.question: Can ceramic coating prevent hurricane damage?
faq.answer: While no product prevents all storm damage, our coating significantly reduces the risk of saltwater etching and protects against flying debris scratches during evacuations.

services.name: Classic Car Restoration
services.shortDescription: Period-correct detailing preserving Savannah's automotive heritage.
services.description:
Savannah's historic homes deserve equally meticulous care for their classic cars. Our restoration detailing revives pre-1990 vehicles with period-appropriate techniques, from single-stage paint rejuvenation to chrome brightening methods used when these cars were new.

The Historic District's cobblestones and live oak canopies present unique challenges - we've mastered removing centuries-old oak tannin stains without harming original finishes. For convertible tops weathered by Savannah summers, we use marine-grade UV protectants developed for Tybee Island boat covers. Every step respects the vehicle's provenance while preparing it for modern coastal conditions.
process: Step 1: Gentle hand wash with pH-neutral cleaners safe for aged finishes
Step 2: Microscopic paint analysis to determine original gloss levels
Step 3: Museum-grade wax application using traditional methods
Step 4: Interior preservation with humidity-regulating products
benefits: Increases resale value for Savannah collectors
Authentic finishes for historic vehicle events
Specialized chrome care for coastal air

faq.question: Do you work on cars stored in downtown carriage houses?
faq.answer: Absolutely. We're experienced with the unique dust patterns and limited access in Savannah's historic properties, bringing mobile equipment tailored for tight spaces.

faq.question: Can you remove patina from barn finds?
faq.answer: We specialize in sympathetic preservation - stabilizing original surfaces while maintaining character. For complete restorations, we partner with local specialists.

services.name: Hurricane Prep Detailing
services.shortDescription: Protect your vehicle before storm season hits the Georgia coast.
services.description:
When hurricane warnings sound in Savannah, most residents focus on boarding windows - we safeguard what's often your second-largest investment. Our storm prep detailing creates multiple defense layers against wind-driven rain, floodwaters, and post-storm humidity.

The service begins with a full interior sealant application that repels moisture - critical when evacuating through standing water. Exterior surfaces receive extra-thick ceramic layers to prevent salt spray etching during coastal evacuations. We even treat undercarriages with corrosion inhibitors for vehicles parked in low-lying areas near the Savannah River.

Post-storm, our reconditioning service reverses damage from emergency parking situations, whether it's pine needle removal from improvised shelter spots or pollen extraction after weeks outdoors.
process: Step 1: Interior waterproofing for seats and electronics
Step 2: Enhanced exterior protection with impact-resistant coating
Step 3: Undercarriage anti-corrosion treatment
Step 4: Emergency contact information etched into protected surfaces
benefits: Peace of mind during chaotic times

faq.question: How far in advance should I schedule before hurricane season?
faq.answer: We recommend April-May appointments to beat the rush. Last-minute slots fill quickly when watches are issued.

faq.question: Do you offer post-storm reconditioning?
faq.answer: Yes, with priority given to prep clients. We document pre-storm condition to streamline insurance claims.

services.name: Daily Driver Maintenance
services.shortDescription: Keep your commuter pristine despite Savannah's punishing conditions.
services.description:
Savannah's combination of sandy backroads, downtown construction, and salty breezes turns daily drivers into dust-covered, corrosion-prone workhorses. Our maintenance program combats these forces with scheduled interventions timed to seasonal threats.

Spring services focus on pollen extraction - our compressed air systems remove yellow powder from places regular washes miss. Summer brings interior deep cleans targeting mold spores that flourish in our humidity. Fall appointments address sap and acorn stains from parking under Savannah's massive live oaks.

We've optimized every process for local commuters, from quick-drying techniques that prevent water spots during sudden thunderstorms to wheel cleaning methods that dissolve brake dust from frequent stop-and-go on Bay Street.
process: Step 1: Engine bay degreasing to prevent sand accumulation
Step 2: Tar removal from downtown road projects
Step 3: Interior anti-microbial treatment
Step 4: Touch-up for parking lot dings common at Savannah workplaces

faq.question: How often should Savannah drivers detail their cars?
faq.answer: We recommend quarterly treatments minimum - monthly for vehicles parked under trees or near the river.

faq.question: Can you remove palmetto bug stains?
faq.answer: Our enzyme cleaners break down organic residues without damaging paint - a Savannah-specific solution we developed through trial and error.

services.name: Luxury Vehicle Program
services.shortDescription: White-glove care for Savannah's high-end automobiles.
services.description:
The Historic District's luxury vehicles face unique indignities - carriage house dust, valet-induced swirls, and cocktail party fingerprints. Our discreet service preserves prestige while accommodating Savannah's social calendar.

We coordinate with downtown concierges to service vehicles during theater performances at the Lucas or rounds at the Golf Club. Our leather conditioning regimen uses humidity-balancing formulas to prevent cracking in climate-controlled garages. Even windshield cleaning receives special attention - we use distilled water to avoid mineral streaks that obscure Savannah's live oak canopies.

For seasonal residents, our storage prep includes activated charcoal pouches to prevent musty odors during humid absences. We document every service with the discretion expected by Savannah's private communities.
process: Step 1: Paint thickness mapping to establish baseline
Step 2: Ultrasonic cleaning for intricate trim
Step 3: Hand-applied glass coating for rainy season visibility
Step 4: Microfiber storage to prevent dust accumulation

faq.question: Do you service vehicles at private islands like Skidaway?
faq.answer: Yes, with advance notice for gated community access. We're familiar with the specific challenges of barrier island storage.

faq.question: Can you remove champagne stains from light interiors?
faq.Answer: Our organic solvent system lifts celebratory residues without altering delicate leather dyes - a necessity after Savannah's many festivals.

reviews.name: Marcus T.
reviews.text: After just one year in Savannah, my truck's paint was getting eaten alive by salt air. Apex's coating stopped the corrosion in its tracks. Two years later, it still beads water like day one - even after parking near the river all summer.

reviews.name: Eleanor R.
reviews.text: They brought my '67 Mustang's single-stage paint back from the dead after decades in a Tybee Island garage. The attention to original factory finishes was museum-quality. Even the judges at the Savannah Concours noticed the difference.

reviews.name: David K.
reviews.text: When we evacuated for the last hurricane, I didn't worry about my car sitting in a Macon parking lot for two weeks. Came back to zero water damage despite torrential rains. Their undercarriage treatment saved my brakes from corrosion.

reviews.name: Lisa P.
reviews.text: The pollen removal service is worth every penny. No more yellow dust coating my black interior after Savannah's spring bloom. They even got it out of the air vents where other detailers never touch.

reviews.name: William G.
reviews.text: As someone who splits time between Savannah and Atlanta, I appreciate how they prepare my car for storage. No musty smells when I return, just that new-car freshness. Their discreet mobile service fits perfectly with my downtown schedule.

reviews.name: Sophia L.
reviews.text: I was skeptical about ceramic coating's value until seeing how easily sap from my driveway magnolia tree wipes off now. The self-cleaning effect saves me weekly washes during Savannah's dusty summers.

service-areas.title: Auto Detailing Service Areas | Savannah & Surrounds
service-areas.description: Serving Savannah, Pooler, Richmond Hill, and coastal Georgia communities with specialized vehicle protection services.

serviceAreas.content: Apex Auto Detailing proudly serves Savannah, offering premium auto detailing services to keep your vehicle looking its best. Whether you're cruising down River Street or parked near Forsyth Park, our expert team ensures your car shines in the coastal Georgia sun. Savannah's humid climate can take a toll on your vehicle's exterior and interior, but our specialized treatments protect against salt air, pollen, and UV damage. We cater to busy professionals, families, and car enthusiasts throughout the Historic District and beyond.
serviceAreas.localContext: Savannah's historic charm and coastal location require special attention to vehicle protection.

serviceAreas.content: Apex Auto Detailing brings top-tier vehicle care to Pooler's growing community. As Pooler continues to expand with new shopping centers and residential areas, we help keep your vehicle looking pristine amid construction dust and daily commutes. Our mobile detailing services are perfect for busy families visiting the Pooler Parkway retailers or professionals working near the Savannah/Hilton Head International Airport. We offer convenient interior and exterior packages designed for Pooler's suburban lifestyle.
serviceAreas.localContext: Pooler's rapid growth means vehicles face more road debris and environmental contaminants.

serviceAreas.content: Serving Richmond Hill's coastal community, Apex Auto Detailing provides exceptional vehicle care for residents commuting to Savannah or enjoying the nearby waterways. Our salt-resistant treatments are especially valuable for cars exposed to the brackish air from the Ogeechee River and coastal marshes. Whether you're driving through historic Fort McAllister or parking at J.F. Gregory Park, we'll help maintain your vehicle's showroom finish. Our ceramic coatings provide long-lasting protection against Richmond Hill's unique coastal environment.
serviceAreas.localContext: Richmond Hill's proximity to tidal rivers requires specialized protection against salt corrosion.

serviceAreas.content: Apex Auto Detailing offers professional auto care solutions for Garden City's industrial and residential areas. Located near the Port of Savannah, we understand the challenges vehicles face from industrial fallout and heavy traffic conditions. Our paint correction services can restore vehicles affected by rail dust and pollutants common in this manufacturing and logistics hub. We serve both personal vehicles and commercial fleets throughout Garden City with flexible scheduling options.
serviceAreas.localContext: Garden City's industrial environment demands frequent vehicle cleaning and protection.

serviceAreas.content: For Bloomingdale residents seeking premium auto detailing, Apex Auto Detailing delivers exceptional results. Our services combat the red clay dust and pine pollen prevalent in this wooded suburban area. Whether you're commuting to Savannah or exploring the nearby Ogeechee River, we'll keep your vehicle looking its best. Our interior detailing packages are especially popular with families transporting kids to Bloomingdale Elementary or enjoying outdoor activities at Tom Triplett Park.
serviceAreas.localContext: Bloomingdale's rural-suburban mix means vehicles accumulate unique dirt and pollen.

serviceAreas.content: Apex Auto Detailing serves Port Wentworth's busy community with professional mobile detailing services. Located near major shipping channels and industrial zones, we specialize in removing industrial fallout and protecting vehicles from environmental damage. Our services are popular with port employees, truck drivers, and residents alike. From thorough interior sanitization to exterior paint protection, we help maintain vehicles navigating Port Wentworth's unique industrial-residential landscape.
serviceAreas.localContext: Port Wentworth's proximity to shipping lanes requires frequent vehicle cleaning.

Our beach package includes thorough undercarriage cleaning to remove salt deposits and protective coatings to shield against UV damage. Whether you're parking near the pier or driving along Butler Avenue, we'll help preserve your vehicle's appearance in Tybee's harsh marine environment.

serviceAreas.content: Serving Wilmington Island's waterfront community, Apex Auto Detailing offers premium protection for vehicles exposed to coastal elements.
